message:
fix: mark children of deferred epics as blocked in ready cache (#74)

`br ready` was incorrectly showing open children of deferred epics because
rebuild_blocked_cache_impl() only checked blocks/conditional-blocks/waits-for
dependencies. Add a phase between direct-blocker insertion and transitive
propagation that finds all issues with a deferred parent and marks them as
blocked in the cache, so they cascade transitively like other blocked issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
